clean_justification: Declared goal (verbatim H1 lede): "All eight gaps and all cross-cutting gates pass on the working-tree post-fix build... Every V1-V20 row was forced to a fresh cache MISS before each live read (C-25). The V2 guitar/en MISS->HIT byte-identical replay is confirmed (C-26). C-23/C-24 incorporated by reference from the gated multilingual report. Bucket B production-rollout safety is consciously deferred." Deliverable that fulfils it: the per-gap/per-gate conformance table (lines 69-83) + C-25 per-row delete/MISS table (lines 24-44) + C-26 comparator section (lines 50-65). (a) Title/content: no drift, body is the post-fix conformance sweep the lede promises. (b) [Unverified]/[Inferred] tags: none present; no load-bearing unverified claims. (c) Scope breadth: in-lane; clause-by-clause contract reconciliation correctly deferred to Subtask 12 (lines 156,174). (d) Citations: 11 file/anchor citations re-traced, 11 pass, 0 fail. C-26 evidence (v2-guitar-delete.log DELETE-1/rows_after=0, v2-guitar-post-miss-select.log hit_count=0 fp local-system-prompt@bd5ebd03+..., v2-guitar-post-hit-select.log hit_count=1, v2-guitar-miss.sse MISS/product_search/shapeable/refinement_chips_with_hatch, v2-guitar-hit.sse HIT) all match claim text verbatim; section anchors multilingual-report § Raw SSE Artifacts, freshness-report § Verbatim MISS/HIT Procedure and § Boundaries all resolve; both by-reference reports exist. (e) Research failure mode (thorough-looking-but-wrong) considered: attacked both load-bearing claims — C-26 comparator tc/len/SHA corroborated by actual SSE payloads and the HIT-path llm_call_count=null matches the stated reconstruction caveat (not a glossed contradiction); C-25 per-row table cross-substantiated by post-miss-all-rows.log (6 rows all hit_count=0) and final-db-state.log (only guitar=1, V7-V15 absent => 0 rows written). Failure mode not present. (f) Research structural elements: executive-summary lede, standard disposition lines (Gate-required/Peer-review/Completeness-risk/Pre-emission self-audit), and ## Verification Exercised/Not-exercised section all present. (g) T3 citations: none (N/A). Self-audit's 3 reconciliations (V1 no-write, V7-V15 MISS-only, C-24 prior-FAIL-vs-PASS) confirmed sound; Bucket B explicitly consciously deferred (line 150).
